HGSS.108.0000:
Welcome to the Battle Arcade!\f
I am your guide to the Single and
Double Battle challenges.\f
Please be aware that these challenges
are designed for a single Trainer.\f
HGSS.108.0001:
Which challenge would you like
to take?[0200,0000]
HGSS.108.0002:
At the Battle Arcade, you may take a
Single or Double Battle challenge.\f
Here, a game board is activated
before every match.\f
Depending on what comes up on the
game board, an event takes place.\f
Some events will be good for the
challenger, while others won’t be.\f
The objective is to keep a winning
streak alive as long as possible.\f
During your challenge, any items held by
your Pokémon will be kept in storage.\f
If you manage to win seven matches in
a row, you will earn Battle Points (BP).\f
If you want to interrupt your
challenge, please save the game.\f
If you don’t save, you will be
disqualified from your challenge.\f
Please be aware of that!\f
HGSS.108.0003:
Welcome to the Battle Arcade!\f
I am your guide to the Multi Battle
challenge.\f
Please be aware that this challenge
requires two Trainers.\f
HGSS.108.0004:
Would you like to take the Battle
Arcade Multi Battle challenge?[0200,0000]
HGSS.108.0005:
You may team up with a friend for a
Multi Battle challenge.\f
Here, a game board is activated
before every match.\f
Depending on what comes up on the
game board, an event takes place.\f
The events may have great impact on
the match’s outcome, good or bad.\f
The objective is to keep a winning
streak alive as long as possible.\f
During your challenge, any items held by
your Pokémon will be kept in storage.\f
If you manage to win seven matches in
a row, you will earn Battle Points (BP).\f
Please note: a Battle Arcade Multi
Battle challenge can’t be interrupted.\f
HGSS.108.0006: We hope to see you again!
HGSS.108.0007:
Please select the Pokémon you wish
to enter.\f
HGSS.108.0008:
Excuse me!\f
You don’t have [0132,0000,0000] eligible Pokémon.\f
You must have [0132,0001,0000] different Pokémon
to enter.\f
HGSS.108.0009: Also, Eggs are ineligible to enter.\f
HGSS.108.0010:
Eggs and [0100,0001,0000] are not allowed
to enter.\f
HGSS.108.0011:
Eggs, [0100,0001,0000], and [0100,0002,0000]
are not allowed to enter.\f
HGSS.108.0028: Please come see me when you are ready.\f
HGSS.108.0029:
Both Trainers have chosen the
Pokémon [0100,0000,0000].\f
Please confer with the other Trainer
and choose different Pokémon.\f
HGSS.108.0030:
Both Trainers have chosen the Pokémon
[0100,0000,0000] and [0100,0001,0000].\f
Please confer with the other Trainer
and choose different Pokémon.\f
HGSS.108.0031:
You must save the game before
I show you in. Is that OK?[0200,0000]
HGSS.108.0033:
We’ve missed you!\f
You must save the game before you
resume your challenge. Please wait.
HGSS.108.0034:
Excuse me!\f
You didn’t save before you quit your
challenge last time.\f
Because of that, you have been
disqualified from your challenge!\f
HGSS.108.0035:
Congratulations!\f
In honor of your victory, we present
you with this commemorative print!\f
HGSS.108.0036:
The Gold Print was added to
[0103,0000,0000]’s Vs. Recorder!\f
HGSS.108.0037:
The Silver Print was added to
[0103,0000,0000]’s Vs. Recorder!\f
HGSS.108.0043:
One Trainer should select
“BECOME LEADER.”\f
The other Trainer must select
“JOIN GROUP.”[0200,0000]
HGSS.108.0044:
We need to launch DS Wireless
Communications.[0200,0000]
HGSS.108.0045:
You must save the game before I
show you in. Please wait.
HGSS.108.0046:
The game board is like your life.\f
It goes round and round
as your fortune goes up and down...\r
How did that sound?\f
It almost made some kind of sense,
didn’t it?
HGSS.108.0047:
There’s an aspect of luck in
Pokémon battles...\f
The Battle Arcade reminds me of that,
decisively. Very decisively...
HGSS.108.0048:
What quality is most needed here?
Is it strength?\r
Wisdom?\r
Luck?\r
No. The answer is...flexibility.\r
That’s what my gut tells me.
HGSS.108.0049:
Do you know what I mean by
“stop on the spot”?\f
It’s the skill of stopping the
game board at the right time!\f
But, remember...\r
If you don’t stop it in 30 seconds,
it will stop by itself.
HGSS.108.0050:
I thought I was fully prepared with my
prized Pokémon, but I had to swap them\r
and use my opponent’s instead!\r
I need to rethink all my strategies.
HGSS.108.0051:
I chose Pokémon that are good at
attacking.\r
But my opponent went for speed!\f
Next time, I’ll try Pokémon with
superior speed.
HGSS.108.0052:
There are advantages to be gained from
“stop on the spot” skills!\f
But there’s a lot of fun in letting the
unknown hand of luck decide...
HGSS.108.0053:
The game board shows better choices
the greater the wins you achieve...\f
Could this board be alive...?
HGSS.108.0054:
Did you figure this one out?\f
Paralyzing events here won’t
affect Ground-type Pokémon.\f
You should tell everybody!
HGSS.108.0055:
I’ll tell you something.\f
Poisoning or freezing events can be
made ineffective.\f
...If the Pokémon’s type or ability
protects it from such status problems.\f
Might be worth knowing!
